summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Villa Paris Gestionale iteration 3. All requested features working correctly: Report Excel has 'Data Evento' header with weekday format (e.g., 'giovedì 01/01/2026'), real data imported (79 events, 92 clients), Dashboard/Report/Clienti/Eventi pages show correct data, Excel download working.
seed_data_creation: 79 events and 92 clients imported from user's Excel file via seed_data.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: 1) Excel report has 'Data Evento' header (NOT 'Mese Evento'), dates include weekday (e.g., 'giovedì 01/01/2026') 2) Dashboard shows 92 clienti, 79 eventi 3) Report Azienda shows 40 events for 2026, €404,880 ricavi, charts populated 4) Clienti page shows 92 clients with search working 5) Eventi page shows 79 events 6) Nuovo Evento form has canale contatto buttons and two client sections 7) API /api/report/stats?year=2026 returns 40 events, /api/report/stats?year=2027 returns 6 events. Database: SQLite at prisma/prisma/dev.db

excel_report_data_evento_header.details: Excel report has 'Data Evento' header in row 4, NOT 'Mese Evento' - verified by parsing xlsx shared strings

excel_report_weekday_format.details: Dates include weekday in Italian: 'giovedì 01/01/2026', 'sabato 03/01/2026', 'domenica 15/03/2026', etc.

excel_report_da_definire.details: Events without dataConfermata show 'Da definire' - verified in xlsx

dashboard_real_data.details: Shows 92 clienti totali, 79 eventi totali, €15,200 ricavi stimati this month

clienti_page_92_clients.details: Anagrafica Clienti shows '92 clienti', search filter works correctly

report_azienda_stats_2026.details: Shows 40 Eventi Totali, 5,061 Ospiti, €404,880 Ricavi for 2026, charts populated with real data

calendario_events_visible.details: Calendar shows events for January 2026 (Concerto Comune di Roseto, C18 Lara, etc.)

nuovo_evento_canale_buttons.details: 6 canale buttons visible: Telefono, Mail, Matrimonio.com, Social, Passaparola, Altro

nuovo_evento_two_client_sections.details: Festeggiato/a (1 contatto) section with Nome/Cognome/Email/Telefono, '2 Contatto (opzionale)' with Aggiungi
